content:
🔥 x402 | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling seamless, network-agnostic payments over the internet using HTTP.
✨ Key Features: • Open standard for internet-native payments • Supports all networks (crypto & fiat) and forms of value (stablecoins, tokens, fiat) • Built on HTTP, complementing existing data transportation • Network, token, and currency agnostic • Backwards compatible
📖 Summary: x402 is an open standard for internet-native payments, built on HTTP. It aims to support all networks and forms of value, abstracting away complexities like gas fees for clients and resource servers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
